title: Ampelodesmos ampelodesmos
taxonomy: Ampelodesmos ampelodesmos is classified as a genus of plants in the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is characterized by its unique, shrub-like habit. The classification of Ampelodesmos ampelodesmos is further detailed at the species level, where it is placed in the family Poaceae, subfamily Pooideae, tribe Aveneae. The species is also known as golden grass or wild couch grass, which is a common name shared with other related species. This unique classification reflects the plant's specific characteristics and its relationship to other grasses within the Poaceae family.
